title: NLP Text App
description: A natural language processing application that demonstrates text analysis capabilities including sentiment analysis, text classification, and language understanding.

title: Obesity Level Prediction
description: A machine learning application that predicts obesity levels based on various health indicators and lifestyle factors using predictive modeling techniques.

title: Cats vs Dogs Classification
description: A computer vision application using deep learning to classify images of cats and dogs with high accuracy, demonstrating convolutional neural network implementation.
